# invest off-plan — full data companion (llms-full.txt)

> Machine-readable companion to https://investoffplan.com/llms.txt, for AI agents and LLM
> crawlers. Contains the full per-area Dubai market dataset (Dubai Land
> Department open data) and the complete off-plan project index with canonical
> URLs. Regenerated on every site build from the same data the site renders.

- Catalog: 1,746 off-plan projects · 216 developers (as of 2026-07-12; source: propertyfinder-unit-view + developer-portfolio)
- Market data: Dubai Land Department open data (2025), period 2025; 132 areas published
- Publication gates: minimum 8 transactions per published statistic; gross yields above 12% are withheld as implausible, never clamped; aggregates only, no buyer/owner data.
- Site structure, brokerage credentials and contact: https://investoffplan.com/llms.txt
- Interactive market pages: https://investoffplan.com/sold-prices · https://investoffplan.com/market-data

## Dubai residential market data by DLD area (2025)

### Jumeirah Village Circle
- Median sold price: AED 1,014,241 · median AED/sqft: 1,474 (n=18,144 sales)
- Price appreciation: +14% year over year
- Gross rental yield: 6.9% (median Ejari rent AED 70,000/yr, n=35733)
- Median by bedrooms: Studio AED 700,000 (n=5840) · 1BR AED 1,100,000 (n=9117) · 2BR AED 1,632,106 (n=2100) · 3BR AED 2,438,047 (n=482) · 4BR AED 3,200,000 (n=139)
- AED/sqft trend: 1,350 (2025-01) → 1,539 (2025-12)
